strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Radd continues in game after game...
strings.panel.p1.bubble.center.html: I must've died a thousand deaths in the last few weeks, but I've seen most of the game.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: The player's getting a lot better, and soon he'll beat the game. Maybe then I'll get a vacation or something.
